# Pull Request Checklist

## What changed

- _Describe the change_

## Why

- _Why this change is needed_

## How to test

- [ ] `swift build` succeeds
- [ ] App launches without empty startup windows
- [ ] Status menu actions still work (enable, mic toggle, help links)
- [ ] About dialog opens and closes correctly
- [ ] Related scripts/workflows were validated when CI/release files changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md`, `ROADMAP.md`, `SECURITY.md`, `PRIVACY.md`) where relevant

## Notes

- _Optional additional context_
